creator: afiskon@devzen.ru
text:
Created attachment 174249
tox.patch

Current description states:

```
This is only the core library. To use it, you have to install a client, like
e.g. net-im/venom or net-im/toxic.
```

There is no more net-im/venom port. Suggested patch fixes description to:

```
This is only the core library. To use it, you have to install a client, like
e.g. net-im/toxic, net-im/qTox or net-im/uTox.
```
